title: Proposal for Lumen Health Diagnostics Private Limited
opening_paragraph: At Verita Corporate Counsel, we understand that for a healthtech company such as Lumen Health — building an AI-powered cardiac monitoring platform now deployed across thirty hospitals and scaling into enterprise sales — protecting the 'LUMEN HEALTH' brand is foundational. Pursuant to our recent discussions, this proposal sets out a clean two-phase mandate to take the wordmark and logo from unprotected to formally on file across the relevant classes within five working days of engagement.
approach_bullets: Conduct a comprehensive pre-filing search across IP India to identify any conflicting marks
Issue a written clearance opinion documenting filing strategy and risk
File TM-A applications for the wordmark and logo across Class 9 and Class 42
Provide ongoing monitoring of the application through examination
scope_section_title: Scope of Services — Trademark Protection of the LUMEN HEALTH Brand
scope_section_intro: We propose a sequenced, two-phase mandate covering search-and-clearance followed by filing across the cardiac monitoring software and hardware (Class 9) and SaaS / cloud analytics (Class 42) categories.

phases.name: Phase I: Comprehensive Search & Clearance Opinion
phases.framing_sentence: Verita Corporate Counsel will conduct a comprehensive pre-filing search of the IP India trademark register to identify any identical or deceptively similar marks before filing fees are committed.
scope_bullets: Comprehensive search of the IP India trademark register for identical and deceptively similar marks across Class 9 and Class 42
Phonetic, visual, and conceptual similarity analysis for the 'LUMEN HEALTH' wordmark and logo
Written clearance opinion with recommended filing strategy and identified risks
outcome_bullets: Clear go / no-go signal before filing fees are committed
Documented basis for filing strategy in case of future opposition

phases.name: Phase II: TM-A Filing — Wordmark and Logo, Class 9 & Class 42
phases.framing_sentence: Subject to the search and clearance opinion in Phase I, Verita Corporate Counsel will file four TM-A applications — the wordmark and logo across Class 9 and Class 42 — and monitor the docket through examination.
scope_bullets: Drafting and filing of TM-A applications: wordmark and logo, Class 9 and Class 42 (4 filings total)
Filing the day after sign-off on the search results
Monitoring of the application docket and acknowledgement of receipt of the application number
Ongoing tracking through examination (typical 6-8 month wait for examination report)
outcome_bullets: Application number(s) within five working days of engagement
Trademark applications on file across Class 9 and Class 42 for both the wordmark and logo

deliverables: Comprehensive trademark search report covering Class 9 and Class 42
Written clearance opinion and recommended filing strategy
Filed TM-A applications (4 filings: wordmark + logo × 2 classes)
Application acknowledgement(s) with assigned application numbers
Docket-tracking memo with key dates through to examination

cost_table.service: Phase I — Comprehensive Search & Clearance Opinion
Phase II — TM-A Filing (wordmark + logo, Class 9 & 42)

exclusions_note: Government filing fees of INR 4,500 per class per mark (4,500 × 2 marks × 2 classes = INR 18,000) are payable directly to the IP India office and are excluded from the legal fee. Applicable taxes are also charged at actuals. Payment terms: 50% advance to commence work; balance on delivery (filing receipts).
deferred_note: Response to any examination objections raised by the Registrar will be quoted separately at the time. Indicative range: INR 8,000 to INR 12,000 per response, depending on the nature and complexity of the objection.
next_steps: Project Confirmation — confirmation of acceptance taken over email
Engagement Agreement — sent across by Verita Corporate Counsel
Work in Progress — comprehensive search commences the same day on receipt of 50% advance
Delivery — application numbers within five working days of engagement
